articles.title: Payton Pritchard’s huge night leads short-handed Celtics over streaking Hawks: 7 takeaways
articles.description:
Pritchard notched 36 points in a dominant performance from the field.

summary: Payton Pritchard scored 36 points, leading the Celtics to victory over the Hawks.
Celtics played without key players, showcasing depth and resilience on March 28.
Boston residents celebrate the Celtics' continued success despite injuries, boosting local sports morale.

articles.title: Why did Jayson Tatum come back this season? The Celtics’ success had ‘a lot’ to do with it.
articles.description:
"You never want to take for granted an opportunity to be on a team that's contending for a championship."

The post Why did Jayson Tatum come back this season? The Celtics’ success had ‘a lot’ to do with it. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum returned to the Celtics for the 2023 season, aiming for a championship.
Tatum emphasized the importance of being part of a contending team this season.
His commitment boosts local fan morale and strengthens Boston's championship aspirations.

articles.title: Tiger Woods released on bail hours after arrest at crash scene on suspicion of DUI
articles.description:
Tiger Woods showed signs of impairment and was arrested Friday at the scene of a car crash.

The post Tiger Woods released on bail hours after arrest at crash scene on suspicion of DUI appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tiger Woods arrested for DUI after showing signs of impairment at crash scene.
Woods was released on bail hours after the incident on March 27, 2026.
Local residents concerned about safety and implications for public figures in Boston.
